questions.question: How long is the longest bridge in the world, the Danyang-Kunshan Grand Bridge?
questions.acceptance: Closest wins. Exact bonus if 164.8 km or 165 km.

questions.question: What is the total length of the Golden Gate Bridge including approaches?
questions.acceptance: Closest wins. Exact bonus if 2,737 m or 2.737 km.

questions.question: What is the main stone arch span of the Solkan Bridge?
questions.acceptance: Closest wins. Exact bonus if 85 m.

questions.question: How many litres are in one barrel of crude oil?
questions.acceptance: Closest wins. Exact bonus if 158.987 L or 159 L.

questions.question: A VLCC tanker carrying 2 million barrels of crude carries roughly how many litres?
questions.acceptance: Closest wins. Exact bonus if within 1 million L.

questions.question: Roughly how thick is the side-shell steel on a modern VLCC tanker?
questions.display_answer: About 19 to 24.5 mm, use 22 mm as target
questions.acceptance: Closest wins. Exact bonus if answer is inside 19 to 24.5 mm.

questions.question: How much does one €50 banknote weigh?
questions.acceptance: Closest wins. Exact bonus if 0.9 g.

questions.question: What are the dimensions of a €50 banknote?
questions.acceptance: Text/numeric hybrid. Exact bonus if width and height are correct.

questions.question: How many €50 banknotes weigh 1 kg?
questions.acceptance: Closest wins. Exact bonus if 1,111 or 1,112 notes.

questions.question: What is the average discharge of the Ljubljanica near Ljubljana/Moste?
questions.acceptance: Closest wins. Exact bonus if 55, 55.4, or 55.6 m³/s.

questions.question: How many tonnes of apples were produced in Slovenian orchard plantations in 2024?
questions.acceptance: Closest wins. Exact bonus if within 500 tonnes.

questions.question: How many 0.5 L beers are in a standard 50 L keg?
questions.acceptance: Closest wins. Exact bonus if 100.

questions.question: At peak/mid-lactation, roughly how many litres of milk can a dairy cow produce per day?
questions.display_answer: About 35 L/day at peak; typical daily range can be lower
questions.acceptance: Closest wins. Exact bonus if 35 L.

questions.question: How much does a mature Holstein-Friesian dairy cow weigh?
questions.display_answer: Up to about 725 kg; common range roughly 680 to 770 kg
questions.acceptance: Closest wins. Exact bonus if within 680 to 770 kg.

questions.question: Which is normally built to generate more low-speed pulling torque: a tractor engine or a car engine?
questions.acceptance: Exact concept required: tractor.

questions.question: How fast can a wild boar run at maximum speed?
questions.acceptance: Closest wins. Exact bonus if 40 km/h.

questions.question: What is a normal weight range for a fully grown male red deer/stag in Europe?
questions.display_answer: Roughly 150 to 200 kg, depending on region
questions.acceptance: Closest wins. Exact bonus if inside 150 to 200 kg.

questions.question: Which animal is generally more dangerous to surprise at close range: roe deer, fox, or wild boar?
questions.acceptance: Exact concept required: wild boar.

questions.question: Which fish is more associated with clean, cold, oxygen-rich water: trout or carp?
questions.acceptance: Exact concept required: trout.

questions.question: A very large European wels catfish can exceed roughly what weight?
questions.display_answer: Over 100 kg; exceptional authenticated examples exceed this
questions.acceptance: Closest wins. Exact bonus if 100 kg or above 100 kg.

questions.question: What is the average discharge of the Ljubljanica at Vrhnika/source area?
questions.acceptance: Closest wins. Exact bonus if 24 to 25 m³/s.

questions.question: Roughly how fast does a petrol chainsaw chain move?
questions.display_answer: About 20 m/s for many petrol chainsaws
questions.acceptance: Closest wins. Exact bonus if 20 m/s.

questions.question: Which wood is generally harder: oak or spruce?
questions.acceptance: Exact concept required: oak.

questions.question: How tall can a mature Norway spruce typically get in a large open landscape?
questions.display_answer: Roughly 15 to 23 m in many landscape references; wild/forest specimens can be taller
questions.acceptance: Closest wins. Exact bonus if inside 15 to 23 m.

questions.question: How many bones does a typical adult human skeleton have?
questions.acceptance: Closest wins. Exact bonus if 206.

questions.question: How many chambers does a mammal heart have?
questions.acceptance: Closest wins. Exact bonus if 4.

questions.question: Are fungi more closely related to plants or animals?
questions.acceptance: Exact concept required: animals.

questions.question: How many bits are in one byte?
questions.acceptance: Closest wins. Exact bonus if 8.

questions.question: What does HTTP stand for?
questions.acceptance: Exact concept required; small spelling mistakes acceptable.

questions.question: What is the decimal number 10 written in binary?
questions.acceptance: Exact answer: 1010.

questions.question: How fast can a lion sprint in short bursts?
questions.acceptance: Closest wins. Exact bonus if 80 km/h.

questions.question: How much does an adult male African savanna elephant weigh on average?
questions.acceptance: Closest wins. Exact bonus if 6,000 kg.

questions.question: On safari, which animal is commonly treated as more dangerous to humans: lion or hippopotamus?
questions.acceptance: Exact concept required: hippo/hippopotamus.

questions.question: Are there more windows or doors in the world?
questions.display_answer: No official answer. Host judged debate question.
questions.acceptance: Debate round. Award winner by best argument or host decision.

questions.question: Are there more wheels or doors in the world?
questions.display_answer: No official answer. Host judged debate question.
questions.acceptance: Debate round. Award winner by best argument or host decision.

questions.question: How many windows do you estimate exist in the world?
questions.display_answer: No official answer. Host sets target before answers or closest to group median wins.
questions.acceptance: Estimation round. Host must define target rule before reveal.
